text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender The USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) and her Carrier Strike Group, who on Thursday hit 296-days at sea, surpassing the record for the longest deployed aircraft carrier since the end of the Cold War, has since transited the Suez Canal from the Eastern Mediterranean and is once again conducting operations in the Red Sea, in support of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), two defense officials tell the Associated Press. The Ford, which initially left the Red Sea in March, after suffering a severe ventilation fire that started in the ship’s laundry and resulted in damage to hundreds of berthings and other compartments, was expected to finally return to Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia after loitering for the last few weeks in the Eastern Mediterranean - with stops in Crete and Croatia. Though it appears that the carrier and its crew has yet again been ordered to remain on station near Iran until the arrival of the USS George H. W. Bush (CVN-77), who is currently taking the long way to the region around the Cape of Good Hope in Southern Africa. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 两名国防官员告诉美联社，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（CVN-78）及其航母打击群周四在海上停留了296天，打破了冷战结束以来航空母舰最长部署时间的纪录。该航母打击群已从东地中海通过苏伊士运河，目前正在红海执行任务，以支持美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）。福特号此前因船上洗衣房引发严重通风火灾，导致数百个铺位和其他舱室受损，于三月离开红海。原本预计它在东地中海徘徊数周（期间停靠克里特岛和克罗地亚）后，最终将返回弗吉尼亚州的诺福克海军基地。但目前看来，该航母及其船员再次接到命令，需留在伊朗附近驻守，直到乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）抵达。布什号目前正绕道南非好望角前往该地区。推文

text: WarMonitor Pretty much sums it up. Peace when markets are open War when markets are closed - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这基本上总结了一切。市场开放时和平，市场关闭时战争 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: WarMonitor Iran’s media is tightly controlled, they can shape different narratives for domestic and global audiences. Reporter: You said everything has been agreed to. Iran was saying something different. Trump: They have to say something different because they have people they have to cater to. I’m just saying it like it is. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045334154443952277/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗媒体受到严格管控，他们可以针对国内和全球受众塑造不同的叙事。记者：你说一切都已经达成一致。伊朗方面的说法却不同。特朗普：他们必须说点不同的，因为他们有需要迎合的对象。我只是实话实说。https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045334154443952277/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺 President Trump on reports of potential U.S. military action in Cuba: It depends on what your definition of military action is, as Bill Clinton would say. You understand that? No? A lot of people don't understand that. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Iran’s’ enriched uranium: We'll go in with Iran and we will take it together and we will bring it back, 100% of it, back to the United States. If we don't do that, we will get it in a different form, in a much more unfriendly form. But in any event, we'll get it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺 特朗普总统就有关美国可能在古巴采取军事行动的报道表示：这取决于你对军事行动的定义是什么，正如比尔·克林顿所说的那样。你明白吗？不明白？很多人都不明白。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普就伊朗的浓缩铀表示：我们将与伊朗合作，我们将共同获取它，并将其带回，100%带回美国。如果我们不这样做，我们将以另一种形式、一种极其不友好的形式得到它。但无论如何，我们都会得到它。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor A federal judge in Illinois granted a preliminary injunction, finding plaintiffs are likely to succeed on claims the Trump administration pressured Apple and Facebook to remove ICE-tracking content, calling it “thinly veiled threats” that likely violated the First Amendment. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊利诺伊州的一名联邦法官发布了初步禁令，裁定原告很可能在指控特朗普政府向苹果和Facebook施压以删除追踪美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）内容一案中胜诉，称这些行为是“掩耳盗铃的威胁”，很可能违反了第一修正案。推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Navy’s Office of the Chief of Naval Operations (CNO) has denied reports from USA Today and other media outlets, which citied Sailors and Marines attached to the vessels, of food shortages and poor conditions onboard the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) and USS Tripoli (LHA-7) deployed to the Arabian Sea. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国海军作战部长办公室（CNO）否认了《今日美国》及其他媒体的报道。此前这些媒体援引了隶属于相关舰艇的海军水兵和海军陆战队员的话，称部署在阿拉伯海的“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰（CVN-72）和“的黎波里”号两栖攻击舰（LHA-7）上存在食物短缺和条件恶劣的情况。推文

You are partners in their aggression." 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NewsNation: U.S. President Trump said he may not extend the ceasefire with Iran when it expires next week, warning that the U.S. could resume military action if necessary. text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇷🇺U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent confirmed that the U.S. will not renew waivers on Iranian and Russia oil. "We will not be renewing the general license on Russian oil, and we will not be renewing the general license on Iranian oil. Because, again…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The U.S. Treasury has issued a new licence extending relief on sanctions covering Russian crude oil and petroleum products for an additional month, now valid through May 16. This comes after U.S. Treasury Secretary said that the U.S. wasn’t going to extend waivers on Russian oil sanctions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇷🇺美国财政部长贝森特证实，美国将不会延长对伊朗和俄罗斯石油的豁免。“我们将不会延长俄罗斯石油的通用许可证，也不会延长伊朗石油的通用许可证。因为，再次重申……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部已发布一项新许可证，将俄罗斯原油和石油产品的制裁豁免期延长一个月，有效期至5月16日。此前，美国财政部长曾表示美国不会延长对俄罗斯石油制裁的豁免。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Of course they did. The US dropped a Friday night notice lifting sanctions on Russian oil for another month. Comes just 2 days after Treasury Secretary Bessant said the US would not renew the waiver. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 他们当然会这么做。美国在周五晚上发布通知，将俄罗斯石油的制裁豁免期再延长一个月。这距离财政部长贝森特（Bessant）表示美国不会延长豁免期仅过了两天。—— OSINTtechnical 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The US Treasury has authorized transactions involving Russian oil until May 16. The exemption covers oil and petroleum products loaded onto tankers before April 17. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部已授权涉及俄罗斯石油的交易至5月16日。该豁免涵盖在4月17日之前装载到油轮上的石油和石油产品。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 It's funny because you are watching Trump's intelligence briefing right now. Also, can someone at Fox News please tell Jesse Watters to ease up on the makeup. The man looks like a blow-up doll Mark Rutte would order online. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian kinetic sanctions on Russian oil remain in effect tonight, with attack drones setting a Russian oil depot in Sevastopol ablaze. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045305226484146330/photo/1 The US dropped a Friday night notice lifting sanctions on Russian oil for another month. Comes just 2 days after Treasury Secretary Bessant said the US would not renew the waiver. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：针对俄罗斯石油的乌克兰动能制裁今晚依然有效，攻击无人机点燃了塞瓦斯托波尔的一个俄罗斯油库。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045305226484146330/photo/1 美国周五晚间发布通知，将俄罗斯石油制裁豁免期延长一个月。就在两天前，财政部长贝桑特还表示美国不会续签该豁免。——OSINTtechnical推文

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) patrols the Arabian Sea, April 17, as U.S. forces enforce the naval blockade on ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. Since commencement of the blockade, 21 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around and return to Iran. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：导弹驱逐舰“迈克尔·墨菲”号（DDG 112）于4月17日在阿拉伯海巡逻，美军正在执行针对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的海上封锁。自封锁开始以来，已有21艘船只遵从美军指令掉头返回伊朗。推文

text: WarMonitor The Atlantic reports multiple officials raised concerns about FBI Director Kash Patel’s drinking, saying he was known to drink to the point of intoxication around government staff, with meetings at times delayed due to late nights tied to alcohol. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045286466972959005/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 《大西洋月刊》报道称，多名官员对联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）的饮酒问题表示担忧，称他以在政府工作人员面前喝到烂醉而闻名，有时会议因他深夜饮酒而推迟。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045286466972959005/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Satellite imagery from yesterday, while the blockade was still in effect, shows at least three Iranian tankers docked at Kharg Island loading oil, along with five more ships at another Iranian port that loaded roughly 9 million barrels that have since disappeared. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045283020450484518/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 昨天的卫星图像显示，在封锁仍然有效的情况下，至少有三艘伊朗油轮停靠在哈尔克岛装载石油，另有五艘船在另一个伊朗港口装载了约900万桶石油，随后去向不明。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045283020450484518/video/1 推文

text: 🔴 WATCH: Relay Drones Explained: The Secret to Extreme FPV Range https://youtu.be/2aTwDLJgl1A?is=A4Nam1d9YBZE7Io0 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kpler, a market intelligence and data analytics firm specializing in commodity flows, primarily energy, commented on today's news about the Strait of Hormuz: Strait open, reality constrained Announcements from Iran and the United States point to a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, yet operational realities tell a different story. Vessel movement remains confined to controlled corridors requiring approval, limiting throughput and raising compliance and reputational concerns. At the same time, the US naval posture continues to restrict Iranian exports. Markets have responded with cautious optimism, reflected in a short term pullback in prices, but underlying supply dynamics remain tight. Any meaningful recovery in flows depends on a gradual return of shipowners, beginning with a tentative “first movers” phase that may restore only a fraction of capacity. A full normalisation in trade and confidence is likely to take months, not weeks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 专注于大宗商品流向（主要是能源）的市场情报与数据分析公司 Kpler 对今天有关霍尔木兹海峡的新闻评论道：海峡开放，现实受限。伊朗和美国发布的公告指向霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放，但运营现实却讲述了另一个故事。船舶航行仍局限于需要批准的受控走廊内，这限制了吞吐量，并引发了合规和声誉方面的担忧。与此同时，美国的军事部署继续限制伊朗的出口。市场以谨慎乐观的态度作出了回应，反映在价格的短期回落上，但潜在的供应动态依然紧张。任何有意义的流量恢复都取决于船东的逐步回归，从试探性的“先行者”阶段开始，该阶段可能只能恢复一小部分运力。贸易和信心的全面正常化可能需要数月而非数周时间。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kpler: Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz remains limited. Kpler reports traffic is still restricted to approval-only corridors as of Friday evening, hours after the US–Iran announced full reopening. Markets show “cautious optimism,” but supply remains tight and full normalization will take months, not weeks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kpler：霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通仍然有限。Kpler 报告称，截至周五晚上，即美伊宣布全面重新开放数小时后，交通仍仅限于需要批准的走廊。市场表现出“谨慎乐观”，但供应依然紧张，全面正常化将需要数月而非数周时间。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 At least 4 people were killed after a tornado struck Lena, Illinois earlier today. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 今天早些时候，伊利诺伊州莱纳市遭遇龙卷风袭击，造成至少 4 人死亡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇫 British media finally got to Burkina Faso, and the answers weren't what they were looking for. Ibrahim Traore, president and leader of the revolution, sat down with Sky News. The journalist came loaded with gotcha questions. He had no problem answering them. On Russian support he said: "Indeed, Russian President Vladimir Putin wanted to provide us with all the necessary resources to fight terrorism, including military personnel. But I have always said: we are Burkina Faso. No one will come to fight for us, and that is a non-negotiable principle." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇫 英国媒体终于抵达了布基纳法索，但得到的答案并非他们所预期的。革命领导人兼总统易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷（Ibrahim Traore）接受了天空新闻台（Sky News）的采访。记者带着一连串刁钻的问题而来，但他毫无压力地一一作答。在谈到俄罗斯的支持时，他说：“确实，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京希望为我们提供打击恐怖主义所需的一切资源，包括军事人员。但我一直说：我们是布基纳法索。没有人会来为我们而战，这是一个不可谈判的原则。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇧🇫 Burkina Faso armed forces killed around 100 militants in a combined air and ground operation near Arbinda in the Sahel region. The operation began with precision airstrikes on militant positions some 20 kilometers northeast of Arbinda, followed by a ground sweep. Around 100 fighters were killed in the assault. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇫 布基纳法索武装部队在萨赫勒地区阿尔宾达（Arbinda）附近的一次空地联合行动中击毙了约 100 名武装分子。行动始于对阿尔宾达东北约 20 公里处武装分子阵地的精确空袭，随后进行了地面清剿。此次袭击共击毙约 100 名武装人员。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 Russian Ministry of Defense released footage of river boat crews from the "Dnepr" battlegroup operating in the Dnepr estuary. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 俄罗斯国防部发布了“第聂伯”战斗群内河船艇部队在第聂伯河口执行任务的画面。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Drone crews of the Maxim Krivonos Battalion at work. Destroyed: two "Baba Yaga" drones near Sergeevka and Belyakovka, and a ground reconnaissance robot near Shevchenko. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 马克西姆·克里沃诺斯（Maxim Krivonos）营的无人机部队正在执行任务。摧毁目标：谢尔盖耶夫卡（Sergeevka）和别利亚科夫卡（Belyakovka）附近的 2 架“巴巴雅嘎”（Baba Yaga）无人机，以及舍甫琴科（Shevchenko）附近的一台地面侦察机器人。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Two "Geran" drones destroy a 150 kV electrical substation in the Krivoy Rog area. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 两架“天竺葵”（Geran）无人机摧毁了克里沃罗格（Krivoy Rog）地区的一座 150 千伏变电站。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Operators of the 14th Guards Special Forces Brigade of the "Vostok" battlegroup destroyed a Ukrainian pickup truck on the Zaporozhye front. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 “东方”战斗群第 14 近卫特种旅的操作员在扎波罗热前线摧毁了一辆乌克兰皮卡车。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Quite the opposite, according to reality. Trump: Before I took office, people thought that America was in decline and the sun was setting on American power; no one thinks that anymore. https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045267151188033991/video/1 - Clash Report tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 事实恰恰相反。特朗普：在我上任之前，人们认为美国正在衰落，美国的力量正在走向黄昏；现在没有人再这样想了。 https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045267151188033991/video/1 - Clash Report 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "I directed Pete Hegseth to begin releasing government files relating to UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena. We found many interesting documents." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045278676590211506/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“我指示皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）开始发布与不明飞行物（UFO）和不明空中现象有关的政府文件。我们发现了许多有趣的文件。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045278676590211506/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @DeItaone : TRUMP SAYS HIS UFO RESEARCH FOUND MANY "INTERESTING" DOCUMENTS tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @DeItaone : 特朗普称他的UFO研究发现了许多“有趣”的文件 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf sends response to Donald Trump: 1- The President of the United States made seven claims in one hour, all seven of which were false. 2- They did not win the war with these lies, and they will certainly not get anywhere in negotiations either. 3- With the continuation of the blockade, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open. 4- Passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be conducted based on the "designated route" and with "Iranian authorization." 5- Whether the Strait is open or closed and the regulations governing it will be determined by the field, not by social media. 6- Media warfare and engineering public opinion are an important part of war, and the Iranian nation is not affected by these tricks. Read the real and accurate news of the negotiations in the recent interview of the Foreign Ministry spokesman. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）回应唐纳德·特朗普：1- 美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项全部是虚假的。2- 他们没有用这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也肯定不会有任何进展。3- 如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。4- 通过霍尔木兹海峡的通行将基于“指定航线”并经“伊朗授权”进行。5- 海峡是开放还是关闭以及管理它的规则将由实地情况决定，而不是由社交媒体决定。6- 媒体战和操纵舆论是战争的重要组成部分，伊朗民族不会受到这些伎俩的影响。请阅读外交部发言人最近采访中关于谈判的真实准确新闻。推文
